ksa_text: Knowledge of model monitoring requirements, including data drift detection, prediction drift, performance degradation metrics, input data distribution monitoring, latency and throughput tracking, alerting thresholds, and retraining triggers appropriate for different model types and serving patterns.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of test procedures, principles, and methodologies (e.g., Capabilities and Maturity Model Integration (CMMI)).

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of data visualization tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of data visualization tools and techniques
Knowledge of test procedures, principles, and methodologies (e.g., Capabilities and Maturity Model Integration (CMMI)).
Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: knowledge maps directly to Data Security Administrator scope — RSK-specific signals detected ("model monitor", "performance.{0,15} ?:degrad|drift", "alert.{0,15}threshold"). STRM composite is moderate (0.4070); note that framework scores routinely underweight risk management and governance vocabulary, so text-based signal carries primary weight here. Seniority is appropriate: the KSA describes practice-level execution, not enterprise strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External check: no matches in RSK job postings or cert curricula (CRISC, FRM, NIST AI RMF, CISM). Would a working Data Security Administrator self-report this as required?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Challenge answered: the competency is implicit in Data Security Administrator work (domain affinity 0.45, 3 RSK signal(s)). Framework vocabulary matching systematically underrepresents risk management and governance KSAs.
